site.name: Kerala Promises
site.tagline: A public notepad for the UDF government's 2026–2031 manifesto promises.
site.subtitle: UDF 2026 manifesto tracker
site.disclaimer: This is not a government or political website. It is an independent public notepad maintained by the people of Kerala. We hold no affiliation with any political party. We track facts, not opinions.
site.good_faith: This tracker was created in good faith. We want the UDF government to succeed in fulfilling these promises for the people of Kerala. We are not here to root for failure.
language.unavailable: Malayalam is in progress. The toggle will be enabled when the translation is ready.
error.404.title: We could not find that page
error.404.body: The page you asked for is not on this site. It may have moved, or the link you followed may be wrong. Use the navigation above to find what you were looking for.
